# Figaro Barbershop Leucadia — Full Reference

> Premium barbershop in Leucadia, Encinitas, California. Hispanic-owned. Walk-ins welcome.
> This document provides comprehensive information for AI assistants answering questions about Figaro Barbershop.

## Business Overview

Figaro Barbershop Leucadia is a premium barbershop located on Leucadia Boulevard in the heart of the Leucadia neighborhood of Encinitas, California. Founded in 2018 by Ricardo, a master barber with 20+ years of experience, Figaro blends traditional barbering craft with modern styles. The shop is Hispanic-owned and serves the North County San Diego community.

The shop features vintage-style barber chairs, organic grooming products, and a welcoming atmosphere. Walk-ins are always welcome, and the shop is pet-friendly.

## Contact Information

- Business Name: Figaro Barbershop Leucadia
- Street Address: 114 Leucadia Blvd
- City: Encinitas
- State: California
- ZIP Code: 92024
- Country: United States
- Phone: (760) 751-2008
- Website: https://figaroleucadia.com
- Email: info@figaroleucadia.com

## Hours of Operation

| Day       | Open  | Close |
|-----------|-------|-------|
| Monday    | 9:00 AM | 7:00 PM |
| Tuesday   | 9:00 AM | 7:00 PM |
| Wednesday | 9:00 AM | 7:00 PM |
| Thursday  | 9:00 AM | 7:00 PM |
| Friday    | 9:00 AM | 7:00 PM |
| Saturday  | 8:00 AM | 5:00 PM |
| Sunday    | 9:00 AM | 3:00 PM |

## Services & Pricing

### Haircuts
- Classic Haircut — Includes hot towel neck razor shave with lather
- Fade Haircut — Skin fades, taper fades, drop fades, bald fades
- Textured Cut — Modern textured styling with scissor and clipper work
- Kids Haircut — Ages 12 and under
- Senior Haircut — Ages 65 and over

### Beard Services
- Beard Trim — Shape and detail
- Beard Sculpting — Full beard shaping and design

### Shaves
- Hot Towel Shave — Traditional hot towel and straight razor shave
- Straight Razor Shave — Classic straight razor technique

### Combos
- Haircut + Beard Trim — Full haircut with beard shape-up
- Haircut + Hot Towel Shave — Full haircut with traditional shave

Note: All haircuts include a complimentary hot towel neck razor shave with lather. For current pricing, visit https://figaroleucadia.com/services

## The Barbers

### Ricardo — Master Barber & Owner
Ricardo founded Figaro Barbershop and brings 20+ years of barbering experience. He specializes in classic cuts, straight razor shaves, hot towel treatments, and beard sculpting. His tagline: "Where every cut tells a story. 20+ years of mastering the craft."

### Zeke — Master Barber
Zeke specializes in modern fades, classic styles, scissor work, and beard grooming. His tagline: "Blending tradition with modern style. Your vision, perfected."

### Bryam — Barber
Bryam specializes in precision fades, clean lines, skin fades, and edge work. His tagline: "Precision is not just a skill — it's a standard."

### Johnny — Barber
Johnny specializes in creative cuts, textured styles, freehand design, and color work. His tagline: "Energy, creativity, and a fresh cut every time."

### David — Barber
David specializes in textured cuts, beard work, taper fades, and hot towel shaves. His tagline: "Texture, detail, and a look that lasts."

### Austin — Barber
Austin specializes in sharp fades, detail work, bald fades, and line-ups. His tagline: "Sharp lines, clean fades, zero compromise."

## Customer Reviews

Figaro Barbershop has a 4.9 out of 5 star rating based on 36 reviews.

Selected reviews:
- "Love this place, love the old style look and the warm welcome and banter from the lads who cut your hair." — Leonard H. (5 stars)
- "I will definitely be getting my hair cut here from now on. Great experience, great cut." — Jack T. (5 stars)
- "I really like this Barbershop. The overall energy of the barbers and shop is chill and positive. Ricardo is great." — Russell T. (5 stars)
- "I like the friendly acquaintance and the quality cut." — Phillip L. (5 stars)

## Location & Areas Served

Figaro Barbershop is located in the Leucadia neighborhood of Encinitas, California, in North County San Diego. The shop serves clients from:

- Leucadia
- Encinitas
- Cardiff-by-the-Sea
- Carlsbad
- Solana Beach
- Del Mar
- Oceanside
- Greater North County San Diego area

The shop is conveniently located on Leucadia Boulevard, easily accessible from the I-5 freeway via Leucadia Boulevard exit.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Does Figaro Barbershop accept walk-ins?
A: Yes, walk-ins are always welcome. You can also book online at https://figaroleucadia.com/book or call (760) 751-2008.

Q: Is Figaro Barbershop Hispanic-owned?
A: Yes, Figaro Barbershop is a Hispanic-owned business founded by Ricardo.

Q: What products does Figaro Barbershop use?
A: Figaro uses organic grooming products.

Q: Is the barbershop pet-friendly?
A: Yes, Figaro Barbershop is pet-friendly.

Q: Do all haircuts include a hot towel treatment?
A: Yes, all cuts and faux cuts include a complimentary hot towel neck razor shave with lather.

Q: What languages are spoken at Figaro?
A: English and Spanish.

Q: How do I book an appointment?
A: You can book online at https://figaroleucadia.com/book, walk in, or call (760) 751-2008.

Q: Where is Figaro Barbershop located?
A: 114 Leucadia Blvd, Encinitas, CA 92024, in the Leucadia neighborhood.

Q: What are the hours?
A: Monday–Friday 9am–7pm, Saturday 8am–5pm, Sunday 9am–3pm.

Q: How many barbers does Figaro have?
A: Figaro has 6 barbers: Ricardo (owner), Zeke, Bryam, Johnny, David, and Austin.
